{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Wolf trainees
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wolf trainees]] follow customized programs with individual trainers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
